advantages: Ships with Python — no install, no agent, no extra infra.
Deterministic: every call is recorded; ratios are reliable.
Function-level granularity gives the most actionable signal first.
Plays nicely with `pstats` for slicing and `snakeviz` for visualisation.
Cheap enough to run in dev / staging on real workloads.
disadvantages: Slows the program 2-5×; not suitable for production.
Doesn't see C-extension internals (numpy ops appear as one call).
Default profiles only the main thread (use `yappi` for multi-thread).
I/O-bound waits show up unhelpfully bundled under blocking calls; sampling profilers handle them better.
